name: Uranium Sector
summary: Day 75 of Hormuz blockade. **C3 URA $54.35 (-5.0% 1D, +4.2% 1M, +4.7% 3M) — FIRST MATERIAL CORRECTION DAY OF THE CLEANEST DECOUPLED LONG THESIS.** -5.0% on the day vs single-name flow rather than ETF-creation/redemption pattern = position trim. AI-secular-bid floor likely intact at $48-50 levels. **Catalyst gap is the operative driver: no fresh HEU news; Rezaei 90% rhetoric is RHETORIC (intel A12 — Iran has not changed enrichment policy, has not expelled IAEA, has not announced 90% production); Russia HEU-custodian Day 14 of 21 watch is non-event so far; US Trump-admin nuclear-equity-investment program details delayed; Microsoft/AWS/Meta no fresh AI-data-center power-PPA announcements this week.** Tasnim/Iranian state silence on operational nuclear file today (vs parliamentary spokesperson rhetoric) reads as DISCIPLINE not de-escalation — but for a market that ran URA +12% on diplomatic rhetoric, no fresh fuel = pullback. **This is the FIRST MATERIAL FALSIFICATION SIGNAL for a thesis-aligned trade in cycle.** Yesterday's call ('Uranium closer to buy-and-hold than reverse-on-ceasefire') survives a -5% day if framed as positioning unwind rather than thesis break — but asymmetry now visible: URA only goes HIGHER on either (a) fresh HEU news with named custodian, OR (b) nuclear-power capex announcement. Without either, URA fades. WATCH: if URA -10% from peak (~$59.50 area early May → ~$53.55 = -10%), today's $54.35 close is close to that line — would require position-thesis revisit. Reversibility: crisis-component (~70%) reverses on (a) Rezaei rhetoric upgraded to operational policy, (b) Russia named as HEU custodian, (c) IAEA suspended, (d) Israeli strike on enrichment facility. Secular component (~30%) only reverses on major AI capex disappointment. Markets dossier proposed promoting `uranium-sector` to confirmed first-class status with edges to `iran` (HEU custody), `nuclear-program`, `united-states` (Trump equity-investment policy) — initial weights iran 6.0, nuclear-program 8.0. ORIGINAL THESIS (May 12 — operative for context): **URA $57.23 (+3.7% 1D, +12.3% 1M, +10.6% 3M) — THE CLEANEST DECOUPLED LONG OF THE CYCLE.** Whereas gold trades inversely with real yields (capped), and Brent has explicit Goldman-vs-JPM-$25 disagreement, uranium gets BOTH the war/HEU geopolitics premium AND the AI-power-demand secular bid — there is NO analogous overhead supply; uranium contract market is structurally undersupplied through 2028. **B2 IRAN'S MAY 10-11 COUNTER-PROPOSAL CONTAINED THE FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF THE CYCLE: dilute portion of stockpile under IAEA supervision + transfer remainder to third country — but with EXPLICIT RETURN CLAUSE demanding HEU returnability if US exits any future deal.** Trump has publicly discussed 'seizing' Iran's enriched-uranium stockpile in prior weeks; Iranian concession-with-return-clause is the precise structural counter. Russia's standing offer (Putin May 9) implicit third-country candidate — never publicly named. **THE NUCLEAR FILE IS NOW THE CENTRAL DIPLOMATIC AXIS OF THE CYCLE — markets pricing nuclear-energy-security premium as durable.** US Trump-admin equity-investment-in-mining policy (loans, offtake agreements, supply-chain reshoring) accelerates secular bid. URA monthly trajectory: +12.3% 1M / +10.6% 3M — outperforming both gold (-0.7% 1M) and oil (+6.3% 1M). **REVERSIBILITY LOW: even a full Iran ceasefire would NOT reverse uranium — secular AI bid persists. This is closer to a 'buy and hold' than a 'reverse on ceasefire' trade.** Crisis-linked %: ~85% (HEU concession + Trump 'seizing' rhetoric); secular ~15% (AI-data-center demand from Microsoft/Amazon/Meta nuclear PPAs). Cameco (~24% of URA), Kazatomprom proxy bid stays strong. JPost-style 'Tehran give away enriched uranium' framing now operative.

active_triggers.condition: Confirmed US/Israeli kinetic action on Iran nuclear-enrichment facility (Natanz, Fordow, Arak)
URA breaks $62 sustained for 3 sessions (above 1M peak +25% from baseline)
Russia formally named as HEU custodian for Iran transfer under any framework agreement within 30 days (by 2026-06-11)
active_triggers.note: Iran's May 10-11 counter-proposal contained first HEU concession (dilute portion under IAEA + transfer remainder to third country, with explicit return clause). Russia's standing offer is implicit candidate. If formally named, uranium-sector + russia + nuclear-program all rerate.

Position trim signature: -5.0% on day vs single-name flow rather than ETF-creation/redemption pattern; AI-secular bid floor likely intact at $48-50 levels. Catalyst gap: no fresh HEU news; Rezaei 90% rhetoric is RHETORIC (Iran has not changed enrichment policy, expelled IAEA, announced 90% production); Russia HEU-custodian Day 14 of 21 watch non-event so far; US Trump-admin nuclear-equity-investment program details delayed; AI-data-center power-PPA pipeline quiet (Microsoft/AWS/Meta no fresh announcements). Tasnim/Iranian state silence on operational nuclear file today (vs parliamentary spokesperson talking) reads as DISCIPLINE not de-escalation. For a market that ran URA +12% on diplomatic rhetoric, no fresh fuel = pullback. Yesterday's 'buy and hold' frame survives if treated as positioning unwind not thesis break — but asymmetry now visible: URA only goes HIGHER on (a) fresh HEU with named custodian or (b) nuclear-power capex announcement. WATCH: if URA -10% from ~$59.50 peak = ~$53.55 line; today's $54.35 close near that line. Reversibility: crisis-component (~70%) reverses on Rezaei rhetoric→policy, Russia named custodian, IAEA suspended, or Israeli enrichment-strike. Secular (~30%) only reverses on AI-capex disappointment. **Markets dossier E4 proposes promoting uranium-sector to confirmed first-class with edges to iran (HEU 6.0), nuclear-program (8.0), united-states (Trump policy).**
sources: Pravda EN (Russia custodian status Day 14 of 21)
recent_signals.verification: URA -5.0% = CONFIRMED tape (yfinance multi-source); Rezaei 90% rhetoric = CONFIRMED RHETORIC NOT ACTION; Russia HEU custodian Day 14 of 21 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE of formal naming; AI-data-center PPA quiet week = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: URA +7.5% TO $58.26 — DUAL BENEFICIARY OF MOU HEU-CUSTODIAN PATH AND STRUCTURAL AI POWER DEMAND. 14-point MOU requires Iran to ship out HEU stockpile (Russia rejected by US; alternatives IAEA, Kazakhstan). Nuclear fuel cycle legitimization signal — civilian uranium custody/processing infrastructure becomes more politically valuable. Cameco 24% of URA up sharply. URA +117% TTM — supply-squeeze narrative undisturbed by oil-crash regime. ~50% crisis (custodian) / ~50% structural (AI). Does NOT reverse cleanly on either MOU path.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED URA price tape (+7.5% multi-source); MOU HEU provision = REPORTED multi-corroborated (custodian undefined); Russia-as-custodian rejected by US = CONFIRMED Russia-side, sidelined as primary mediator

historical_summaries.summary: 3 signals. URA +7 | AI-structural component (~55% per markets | URA -2
